$comment: Authored canonical end-state for full-quote.script.json — written by hand, NOT captured from a run, so a bug shared by both flows cannot certify itself (TEST-30, TOOL-18). Premium arithmetic recomputed by the implementor from lib/quote/premium.js constants: estimatedValue 12000 -> valueLoading round(12000 * 0.01) = 120; (480 + 120) * comprehensive multiplier 1 = 600; + recent-claims loading 120 (hadClaims yes); + penalty points 3 * 15 = 45; - no-claims discount 5 * 25 = 125; + extras breakdown 60 + legal 25 = 85; total 600 + 120 + 45 - 125 + 85 = 725; max(725, 150) = 725.

modDescription.modifications: Alloy wheels and a remapped engine
